title: EvidenceIndexArtifact

artifact_id.description: Unique ID for this indexer artifact, referenced by Job.result_ref and Run.output_refs.

job_id.description: ID of the evidence_indexing Job that produced this artifact.

run_id.description: ID of the Run that contains this artifact in output_refs.

raw_materials.description: Input: raw case material segments submitted to the indexer. Each item must have a unique source_id within this artifact.

evidences.description: Output: structured Evidence objects produced from raw_materials. Each Evidence must bind at least one target_fact_id and have status='private', access_domain='owner_private'.

source_id.description: Stable identifier for this raw material segment. Becomes Evidence.source after indexing.

text.description: Plain text content of the raw material. v0.5: no OCR, text provided directly.

metadata.description: Caller-supplied metadata (document_type, date, submitter, etc.). Schema is open for v0.5.

description: EvidenceIndexArtifact is the replayable artifact produced by the evidence_indexing Job. It bundles the full raw_materials input and all structured Evidence outputs so that the run can be replayed without external lookups. After the job completes, each Evidence in 'evidences' is written into CaseWorkspace.material_index.Evidence.
